title: Mansfield +3
description: 7x5 min @ 100-105% with 4 min rest — threshold progression
purpose: Extended threshold work at and above FTP

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep — settle into 105% quickly. Don't overshoot the first 30 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: The pain is temporary. The fitness is permanent. Don't you dare back off now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval: maximize time at >90% VO2max. Breathing should be gasping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your competition is resting. You're getting faster. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs will remember this. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where average athletes quit. You're not average. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midway through set 4. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You're not breaking. You're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This interval is dedicated to whoever said 'it doesn't get easier, you just go faster.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: This is hard. That's the point. Keep your rhythm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 20min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5 of 7 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 2 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 6 of 7.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/7 — hold 105% FTP at 95-105 rpm. Seated. 300s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 6 of 7 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. Your body is lying to you — you have more. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 0s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 49 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 7. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 7: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
